summary: Key catalysts focus on AI data center demand, new product cycles, and management commentary on supply and customer visibility.

catalysts.name: Continued AI data center demand
catalysts.description: Sustained hyperscaler and enterprise AI infrastructure spending could support revenue growth and valuation multiples.

catalysts.name: New GPU and networking product cycles
catalysts.description: Product refreshes across GPUs, networking, and AI platforms may reinforce NVIDIA's competitive position.

catalysts.name: Management commentary on demand visibility
catalysts.description: Investor sentiment may be sensitive to comments on customer concentration, supply constraints, and the durability of AI spending.
